reviews.comment:
Tienen pocos surtidores y los empleados muchas veces están muy desganados, por lo que se hacen colas de muchos autos y muuuuucha demora.

(Translated by Google)
They have few pumps and the employees are often very unmotivated, so there are long lines of cars and a loooong delay.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPbnBXT19BRRAB

reviews.comment:
No pudimos cargar, habían dos filas de cinco autos cada una y nos cansamos de esperar, en los 10 minutos que estuvimos ni se movieron. El playero paseando, y la cola estaba al borde de la ruta. Nos fuimos y cargamos sobre la ruta 2.

(Translated by Google)
We couldn't fill up; there were two lines of five cars each, and we got tired of waiting. In the 10 minutes we were there, they didn't even move. The attendant was just strolling around, and the line stretched all the way to the side of the road. We left and filled up on Route 2.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkLTYtVENnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena onda el playero. Pero no había NAFTA súper solo infinia. Y al cola siempre por qué es la única estación de servicio en kilómetros.

(Translated by Google)
The attendant was really nice. But they didn't have Super gasoline, only Infinia. And there's always a queue because it's the only gas station for miles around.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkanEzYVl3EAE

reviews.comment:
Se necesita ampliación y modelación más moderna URGENTE.
No tiene full las 24 horas.
Se necesita más servicios, con atención especial a socios.
Esta estación tiene mucho movimiento y requiere mayor cantidad de servicios. Es la única entre Villa Gesell y Mar del Plata.
Para remodelación y ampliación tiene terrenos amplios para ser ocupados.
Se puede poner una hostería urgente.

(Translated by Google)
Expansion and a more modern design are urgently needed.
It's not currently open 24 hours a day.
More services are needed, with special attention to members.
This station is very busy and requires more services. It's the only one between Villa Gesell and Mar del Plata.
It has ample land available for remodeling and expansion.
A hotel could be added urgently.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQwbzZ1QmVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Trataría de cargar combustible en otro lado en temporada , es un lugar que se llena mucho de autos , pero si no queda otra ..

(Translated by Google)
I would try to refuel somewhere else during peak season, it's a place that gets very crowded with cars, but if there's no other option...

reviews.comment:
$400 por cargar agua para el mate?? Un robo. Después se quejan cuando la costa argentina está vacía porque en otros países nos tratan mejor y NO SE ABUSAN.

(Translated by Google)
$400 to fill up with water for mate?? That's highway robbery. Then they complain when the Argentine coast is empty because in other countries they treat us better and DON'T TAKE ADVANTAGE OF US.
